title: streblus tonkinensis
intro: Streblus tonkinensis, also known as the Chinese ironwood or Chinese swamp ironwood, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia that belongs to the family Cannabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Streblus tonkinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infectious diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations to harness its medicinal properties.
